name: Piki and Poko: Adventures in Starland
original_name: Piki and Poko: Adventures in Starland
overview: Two super cute girls are out to save StarLand from total chaos. Follow these anime-inspired teen heroines as they battle a cast of fantastic characters, and mix it up with zodiac DJs along the way.

trailers.title: Piki and Poko - Adventures in Starland - Ep. 1: Perfect Match
